title: CVE-2001-0856 — CVSS 4.6 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2001-0856

CVSS Score: 4.6 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2001-12-06T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Common Cryptographic Architecture (CCA) in IBM 4758 allows an attacker with physical access to the system and Combine_Key_Parts permissions, to steal DES and 3DES keys by using a brute force attack to create a 3DES exporter key.

References: http://marc.info/?l=bugtraq&m=100533053219673&w=2, http://www.cl.cam.ac.uk/~rnc1/descrack/, http://www.cl.cam.ac.uk/~rnc1/descrack/attack.html
